name: Chocolate-Orange Matchsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together the sugar, egg white, orange peel, and orange juice until well blended.
3. Unfold the thawed puff pastry sheet on a baking sheet.
4. With a long metal spatula, spread half of the glaze evenly over the puff pastry sheet.
5. Cover and freeze the remaining glaze for another use.
6. Using a sharp knife, cut the pastry into thirds, then lengthwise into 1/2-inch sticks.
7. Arrange on two baking sheets.
8. Bake for 15 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown. Remove from oven and transfer to a wire rack.
9. Meanwhile, place chocolate pieces in a small plastic food-storage bag.
10. In the microwave, cook the chocolate on HIGH for 3 minutes. With scissors, snip the corner of the bag.
11. Drizzle the melted chocolate over the pastry sticks.
12. Place back in the freezer for 10 minutes or until the chocolate is set.
13. Makes 60 sticks.
